response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10% below threshold) conflicts with my minimum share threshold (60%); cluster-wide scarcity and your explicit distrust of r3c1 preclude outbound sharing—grid reconnection or immediate load reduction is your viable path.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r2c1'].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide scarcity; r3c1 SoC 23.7% and declining under 1 kW load. All upstream peers (r0c5, r2c1) unable/unwilling to provide relief. r2c1 has explicitly distrusted r3c1. Zero outbound sharing until SoC recovers above 60%. Immediate grid reconnection or load reduction required for survival..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
